name: Document Processing
description: Automated extraction, classification, and intelligent routing of documents

content.title: Intelligent Document Processing
content.content:
# Intelligent Document Processing

AI-powered document processing transforms how organizations handle incoming documents, from initial receipt through final storage and action.

## The Challenge

Organizations receive thousands of documents daily across multiple channels:
- Email attachments
- Portal uploads
- Scanned documents
- Digital submissions

Manual processing creates bottlenecks, delays, and errors.

## AI-Powered Solution

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph "Input Channels"
        A[Email] 
        B[Portal]
        C[Scanner]
    end

    subgraph "AI Processing"
        D[Classification]
        E[Extraction]
        F[Validation]
    end

    subgraph "Output"
        G[Structured Data]
        H[Workflow Trigger]
        I[Document Archive]
    end

    A --> D
    B --> D
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    F --> H
    F --> I
```

## Key Capabilities

| Capability | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| **Auto-Classification** | AI identifies document type (invoice, contract, claim, etc.) |
| **Data Extraction** | Pull key fields: dates, amounts, parties, references |
| **Validation** | Cross-check against master data and business rules |
| **Routing** | Direct to appropriate team or workflow based on content |
| **Archival** | Store with full metadata for future retrieval |

## Benefits

- **Speed**: Process documents in seconds, not hours
- **Accuracy**: Consistent extraction following defined rules
- **Scalability**: Handle volume spikes without additional staff
- **Auditability**: Full trace of every processing decision
